findings.detail: Source-level pre-flight: 7 nodes (within 3-8), all bold labels <= 4 words, title governs whole diagram via config block ('Cosine Similarity — Direction, Not Size'), 2-panel LR layout with direction TB subgraphs matches intent (angle cases + formula pipeline). All node labels trace to corpus §5.2 and §5.3 concepts: angle cases (0°/90°/180°) with cos values map to §5.2; dot product, magnitudes, divide/normalise, and score range map to §5.3. No jargon, no concept drift, no forward references (no vector databases, BERT, transformers). Color tiers correct: ANGLES panel uses start (blue), FORMULA steps use auto (purple), terminal score node uses done (green). PNG render requires mmdc CLI — not available in this session; visual inspection bypassed per established project pattern.

preflight.mermaid_parse: pass (source-level check; mmdc unavailable for exec)
preflight.concept_fidelity: pass (all labels trace to corpus §5.2 angle cases and §5.3 formula steps; dot product cross-ref to 6.6 is explicitly sanctioned by artifact intent)
preflight.jargon_label: pass (no bare unexplained acronyms; all terms defined in corpus)
preflight.title_discipline: pass (governing concept in title: field; no ghost node used for central organizing idea)
preflight.single_path: pass (ANGLES panel: linear 3-step angle sequence; FORMULA panel: convergent flow F1+F2->F3->F4 is intentional — two inputs merge for formula, matching corpus §5.3 semantics)
